name: Numbered Folder Creator

releases.author: Rajdeep31
releases.description:
## Numbered Folder Creator 1.0.0

Initial release of the Numbered Folder Creator plugin for Obsidian.

### Features
- Automatically adds sequential numbering to newly created folders and notes
- Prevents renaming of already numbered items
- Ignores vault root directory
- Skips placeholder names like "Untitled"
- Includes a command to retroactively number existing folders and notes

### Command
Retroactively number all subfolders and notes

### Safety
The plugin includes safeguards to avoid unintended modifications:
- Existing numbered items are not modified
- Vault root items are ignored
- Recursive rename loops are prevented
releases.name: 1.0.0 - initial release
